title: englerina ramulosa
intro: Englerina ramulosa, also known as the hairy Englerina, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, Englerina ramulosa is often combined with other plants to create infusions, decoctions, and ointments that are used to treat various health conditions.
